liquibase

Interface SingletonObject

  • All Known Subinterfaces:
    PluginFactory
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractPluginFactory, ChangeFactory, CommandFactory, ExecutorService, HubServiceFactory, LicenseServiceFactory, LiquibaseConfiguration, LogFactory, LogServiceFactory, TestSystemFactory, UIServiceFactory

    public interface SingletonObject
